overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character exploring a desert oasis environment. The character walks from rocky terrain down to a riverbank, passing ancient ruins and palm trees along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert path near ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: character walking away from wooden ruins toward the distant river valley

entered.detail: weathered wooden scaffolding and stone foundation of ancient building
circular stone well structure with wooden frame
large reddish-brown rocky mountains forming the valley backdrop
sandy dirt trail winding through rocky desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a dirt path in a desert environment, passing wooden ruins and a stone well. Rocky mountains rise in the distance under a bright clear sky as the character heads toward a distant river valley.

events.description: terrain opens to reveal the river and distant palm grove across the water

agents.ego_description: character approaching the riverbank, observing the water and landscape ahead

entered.detail: calm river water reflecting sunlight, bordered by palm trees
small wooden rowboat moored near the shore with rope
reddish boulder outcrop at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the river as the terrain transitions to rocky gravel. The river comes into view with a wooden boat visible on the shore, while large rock formations mark the riverbank.

events.description: dead hippopotamus becomes visible on the sandy shore to the right
character steps from sand into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: character walking past the dead hippo and wading into the shallow water along the shore

entered.detail: large deceased hippopotamus lying on its side on the sand
clear shallow river water with visible rocks and aquatic plants beneath surface
tall dry grass and reeds growing along the waterline

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the shore where a dead hippopotamus lies on the sand. The character wades into the shallow river water, passing the boat now drifting in the background, while tall reeds line the riverbank.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined river path with tall grasses

agents.ego_description: character continuing along the river through dense tall grass and palm trees

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees with orange-tinted fronds lining the path
steep rocky cliff face rising beside the river path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sandy path bordered by dense palm groves on the right and rocky cliffs on the left. The river now flows on the right side as the character moves through tall grasses away from the dead hippo.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dry desert plateau down into a lush, river-fed oasis. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path past wooden ruins and a stone well, with rocky mountains looming under a bright sky. As the character descends toward the valley, the terrain shifts to rocky gravel before opening up to reveal a riverbank featuring a wooden boat and large rock formations. The scene then transitions to the water's edge, where the character passes a dead hippopotamus on the sand and wades into the shallow river amidst tall reeds. Finally, the camera follows the character along a narrow sandy path bordered by dense palm groves and rocky cliffs as they move through tall grasses away from the shore.
